_meta.source: Mage Knight base game — Tovak skill tokens
_meta.note: Prepared for hero selection / dummy player skill decks. Action types not in the engine's supported set (enemy_armor_reduction, discard_wound_draw_card, sideways_bonus, draw_cards, cooperative_mana_overload) are informational until fully engine-supported.

skills.name: Double Time
skills.effect: Move 2 (during the Day), or Move 1 (at Night).

skills.name: Night Sharpshooting
skills.effect: Ranged Attack 1 (during the Day), or Ranged Attack 2 (at Night).

skills.name: Shield Mastery
skills.effect: Block 3, or Fire Block 2, or Ice Block 2.

skills.name: Resistance Break
skills.effect: Choose an enemy token: it gets Armor -1 for each resistance it has, to a minimum of 1.

skills.name: I Feel No Pain
skills.effect: Once a turn, except in combat: discard one Wound from your hand. If you do, draw a new card.

skills.name: I Don't Give a Damn!
skills.effect: One card played sideways gives you +2 instead of +1. If it is an Advanced Action, Spell or Artifact, it gives +3 instead.

skills.name: Who Needs Magic?
skills.effect: One card played sideways gives you +2 instead of +1. If you use no die from the Source this turn, it gives +3 instead.

skills.name: Motivation
skills.effect: Once a Round, on any player's turn: flip this to draw two cards. If you have the least Fame (not tied), also gain a blue mana token.

skills.name: Mana Overload
skills.effect: Cooperative: choose a basic color and gain a mana token of that color. Put this Skill token in the center marked with that color. The first player who uses mana of that color to power a card giving Move, Influence, Attack or Block gets +4 from that card and returns the Skill to you, face down.
